about.title: About
about.intro: Hi, I'm Lars Kleen — a software developer based in Germany. I write about software architecture, Angular, TypeScript, and developer experience.
about.more: This site is built with Angular, rendered server-side for fast first paint and proper social sharing previews, and deployed on Vercel. All content lives in Markdown, tracked in Git.

cookie.message: This site uses Google Analytics to understand how readers find and use content. No data is collected without your consent.
